name: 8 Days of School
short_description: Play through this loved-filled adventure. Find friends, lovers, or enemies at every turn. Some “friends” are not as they seem. Danger lurks here! Unravel the mystery and find love before time runs out in 8 Days of School.
detailed_description:
Embark on a romantic comedy adventure commonly called “college.” Interact with 13 separate romantic interests in this choice-driven narrative with more than a dozen possible endings. Make the right choices, and you may find your way to a bedroom or two. But wait! There’s more to this “school” than meets the eye.

People have been going missing. Teachers are behaving weirdly. You meet a person in a bush. Are you being hunted? Navigate a world of decisions that can bring you closer to friendship or closer to death. Or both…

This world is alive with dozens of locations. Music that softly pulls you further and further down the rabbit hole. Feel the weight of your decisions as lives and lovers hang in the balance.

Watch as you plead and beg to escape this world filled with light-hearted characters, comedic storytelling, romantic twists and turns, extreme violence at the drop of a hat, and memorable characters.

The people you meet have their own agendas, problems, pains, hopes, and dreams. It’s up to you to find what you can do to help them…

Or what you can do to hurt them…

Not everyone has your best interests at heart. Can you navigate this twisting story to find true love, or will you be face down in a ditch, forgotten and rotting?
